articles.title: Altcoin Designed To Enable Bitcoin Smart Contracts Has Surged by More Than 60% This Week
articles.description: One Bitcoin-native altcoin shot up more than 60% this week as BTC continues its ascent towards $60,000. The altcoin is Stacks (STX), a blockchain protocol that’s bringing smart contract capability to the Bitcoin network. articles.description: The estranged co-founder of DOGE is seeking support from the network’s node operators, asking them to upgrade their nodes in order for the blockchain to work more efficiently. articles.title: Polygon ($MATIC) Transactions Plunge as its Price Jumps 20%
articles.description: The Polygon (MATIC) network has increased its transaction fees 30x from a default value of 1 gwei to a minimum value of 30 gwei, according to a post published by Polygon co-founder Sandeep Nailwal suggesting the move was necessary to deter spam transactions on the network. articles.title: Charlie Lee Sums Up Litecoin’s 10 Years History. Part Five: Conflict Of Interest
articles.description: It’s great that the founder decided to give us one more chapter of Litecoin‘s story. Let’s tie up loose ends and wrap this whole series with a bow on top. As it turns out, Charlie Lee returned to his job at Coinbase. Was the company more supportive this time around? Plus, as we warned you last time, at one point Lee sold all of his LTC. What were his reasons to do that? Did he have a plan?...

articles.title: Mexico’s President evades calls to incorporate Bitcoin as legal tender
articles.description: El Salvador‘s decision to adopt Bitcoin as legal tender has set off a wave of political excitement across Latin America. articles.title: Flow integrates Filecoin storage services to make NFTs more decentralized
articles.description: Filecoin has become the official storage partner of the Flow Blockchain, with the firm working to provide decentralized storage for NFTs minted on Dapper Lab's network.

articles.title: Petition to List Shiba Inu ($SHIB) on Robinhood Closes in on 250,000 Signatures
articles.description: Supporters of the popular meme-inspired cryptocurrency Shiba Inu ($SHIB) have been signing a petition asking commission-free trading platform Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD) to list their cryptocurrency on their platform. The petition, titled “Kindly request of Robinhood to list Shiba Inu coin” has, at press time, over 241,600 signatures from backers and is looking to reach 300,000. […]
